title: deep-context native-only default executor pool
description: Make the deep-context executor pool native-only by default (2 @deep-context seats in deep_context_config.json fanout.executors) and restructure the setup pool question to A) Native only (default) / B) Custom, removing the specific model list from the user-facing options. De-name the heterogeneous pool across the command, both YAMLs, SKILL.md, and README; soften the agent body and re-sync the three runtime mirrors. The by-model-shared-scope mode enum and YAML dispatch logic are unchanged; the heterogeneous pool stays available via --executor/--executors.
